---
title: "FigS5 Genomic Coverage of Selected Genes"
author: "Jie Hua"
date: 2026-04-06
lang: en
date-modified: 2026-04-06
keywords: ["Genomic Coverage","Hybrid Cells"]
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    section-divs: true
    code-fold: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-copy: hover
    number-sections: true
    highlight-style: tango
editor: visual
---

# Load the required packages

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Read the basic information

Read the genomic coverage

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

# Genomic coverage of all annotated genes(already normalized)
#genomic_coverage_file="F:\\Big Paper\\Processed data\\Fig5_Dosage and Transcriptome\\genome_coverage_matrix.csv"


# File
folder <- "H:\\HybridCells_Data\\Fig3_Dosage and Transcriptome\\"

genomic_coverage_file=paste0(folder, "genome_coverage_matrix.csv")


genomic_coverage <- fread(genomic_coverage_file)

cols <- c("Gene", "5A", "5B_P2", "6B","7B_P2","ML82","Ras3")
genomic_coverage <- genomic_coverage[, ..cols]
colnames(genomic_coverage) <- c("Gene", "HYC1", "HYC2", "HYC3","HYC4","ML82","Ras3")

```

Read the orthogroup information

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

orthogroup_gene_file=paste0(folder, "orthofinder_gene.csv")

orthogroup_gene <- fread(orthogroup_gene_file)

cols2 <- c("Orthogroup","isoquant_split.mel.pep.nostar","isoquant_split.sim.pep.nostar")
orthogroup_gene <- orthogroup_gene[, ..cols2]
```

# Define selected genes

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

labels <- c("Hmr","Lhr","Boh1","Boh2","Nlp","Nph","gfzf","Nup98-96","cid","msl-2","mof","msl-3","mle")

mel_id <- c("FBgn0001206","FBgn0034217","FBgn0053213","FBgn0032354","FBgn0016685","FBgn0039735","FBgn0250732","FBgn0039120","FBgn0040477","FBgn0005616","FBgn0014340","FBgn0002775","FBgn0002774")

```

# Prepare the table

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res <- orthogroup_gene %>%
  filter(!is.na(isoquant_split.mel.pep.nostar)) %>%
  separate_rows(isoquant_split.mel.pep.nostar, sep = ",") %>%  # 拆开mel列
  filter(isoquant_split.mel.pep.nostar %in% mel_id) %>%       # 只保留目标mel_id
  mutate(isoquant_split.mel.pep.nostar = factor(
    isoquant_split.mel.pep.nostar, levels = mel_id
  )) %>%                                                     # 指定排序顺序
  arrange(isoquant_split.mel.pep.nostar) %>%                 # 排序
  distinct(
    isoquant_split.mel.pep.nostar,
    isoquant_split.sim.pep.nostar
  )


final_df <- tibble(
  label = labels,
  mel_id = mel_id
) %>%
  left_join(
    res %>%
      mutate(
        mel_id = as.character(isoquant_split.mel.pep.nostar),
        sim_id = isoquant_split.sim.pep.nostar
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(mel_id, sim_id),
    by = "mel_id"
  )
```

# Prepare coverage table

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

sample_cols <- c("Ras3","ML82","HYC1", "HYC2", "HYC3","HYC4")

# 1. 取 mel 的 coverage
mel_cov <- final_df %>%
  dplyr::select(label, mel_id) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    genomic_coverage %>%
      tibble::as_tibble() %>%
      dplyr::rename(mel_id = Gene),
    by = "mel_id"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(label, dplyr::all_of(sample_cols)) %>%
  dplyr::rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_mel"), dplyr::all_of(sample_cols))

# 2. 取 sim 的 coverage
sim_cov <- final_df %>%
  dplyr::select(label, sim_id) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    genomic_coverage %>%
      tibble::as_tibble() %>%
      dplyr::rename(sim_id = Gene),
    by = "sim_id"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(label, dplyr::all_of(sample_cols)) %>%
  dplyr::rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_sim"), dplyr::all_of(sample_cols))

# 3. 合并 mel 和 sim
cov_table <- mel_cov %>%
  dplyr::left_join(sim_cov, by = "label")

# 4. 调整列顺序：5A_mel, 5A_sim, 5B_mel, 5B_sim ...
ordered_cols <- as.vector(rbind(
  paste0(sample_cols, "_mel"),
  paste0(sample_cols, "_sim")
))

# 5. 转矩阵
cov_matrix <- cov_table %>%
  dplyr::select(label, dplyr::all_of(ordered_cols)) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("label") %>%
  as.matrix()
```

# Plot

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false


my_family="sans"

sample_order <- sample_cols
label_order <- rownames(cov_matrix)

plot_df <- cov_matrix %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("label") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -label,
    names_to = "sample_species",
    values_to = "coverage"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::separate(
    sample_species,
    into = c("sample", "species"),
    sep = "_(?=[^_]+$)"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    coverage_group = factor(
    ifelse(coverage > 0, "Present", "Absent"),
    levels = c("Absent", "Present")
    ),
    sample = factor(sample, levels = sample_order),
    species = factor(
      species,
      levels = c("mel", "sim"),
      labels = c("D. mel", "D. sim")
    ),
    label = factor(label, levels = rev(label_order))
  )

p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = sample, y = label, fill = coverage_group)) +
  geom_tile(color = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
  facet_grid(. ~ species) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Absent" = "#ed556a", "Present" = "#61649F"),
    name = "Presence"
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(x = "Samples", y = "Genes") +
  theme_bw(base_family = "sans")+
  theme(
      # Transparent backgrounds
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      
      # Grid
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      
      # Border
      panel.border = element_rect(
        color = "black",
        fill = NA,
        linewidth = 0.1
      ),
      
      # Avoid double-thick borders
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      
      # Facet labels
      strip.text.x = element_text(
        angle = 0,
        hjust = 0.5,
        size = 6,
        family = my_family,
        color = "black",
        face="italic",
        margin = margin(t = 1, r = 0, b = 3, l = 0)
      ),
      strip.text.y.left = element_text(
        angle = 0,
        hjust = 1,
        size = 6,
        family = my_family,
        color = "black",
        face="italic",
        margin = margin(t = 0, r = 3, b = 0, l = 1)
      ),
      
      # Axis text
      axis.text.x = element_text(
        size = 6,
        color = "black",
        family = my_family
      ),
      axis.text.y = element_text(
        size = 6,
        color = "black",
        family = my_family,
        face="italic"
      ),
      
      # Axis titles
      axis.title.x = element_text(
        size = 7,
        color = "black",
        family = my_family
      ),
      axis.title.y = element_text(
        size = 7,
        color = "black",
        family = my_family
      ),
      
      # Major ticks
      axis.ticks.x = element_line(
        linewidth = 0.2,
        color = "black"
      ),
      axis.ticks.y = element_line(
        linewidth = 0.2,
        color = "black"
      ),
      axis.ticks.length = unit(1.5, "pt"),
      
      # Minor ticks
      axis.minor.ticks.x = element_line(
        linewidth = 0.1,
        color = "black"
      ),
      axis.minor.ticks.y = element_line(
        linewidth = 0.1,
        color = "black"
      ),
      axis.minor.ticks.length.x = unit(0.8, "pt"),
      axis.minor.ticks.length.y = unit(0.8, "pt"),
      
      # Compact legend
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.text = element_text(
        size = 6,
        color = "black",
        family = my_family,
        margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 2)
      ),
      legend.key.size = unit(6, "pt"),
      legend.key.width = unit(6, "pt"),
      legend.key.height = unit(6, "pt"),
      legend.key.spacing.x = unit(1, "pt"),
      legend.key.spacing.y = unit(1, "pt"),
      
      legend.spacing.x = unit(1, "pt"),
      legend.spacing.y = unit(1, "pt"),
      legend.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0),
      legend.box.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0),
      legend.box.spacing = unit(2, "pt"),
      
      # Facet spacing
      panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
      panel.spacing.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
      strip.placement = "outside",
      strip.switch.pad.grid = unit(0, "pt"),
      strip.clip = "off",
      
      # Plot margin
      plot.margin = margin(t = 4, r = 2, b = 0, l = 2)
    )+
  guides(
      fill = guide_legend(
        keywidth = unit(6, "pt"),
        keyheight = unit(6, "pt"),
        ncol = 1,
        bycol = TRUE,
        label.position = "right",
        label.hjust = 0,
        override.aes = list(
        colour = NA,
        alpha = 0.95
      )
      )
    )
```

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
p_canvas <- p+ggview::canvas(150,80,units="mm",dpi=900,bg="transparent")
p_canvas
#ggsave("figS4.pdf",p,width=150,height=80,units="mm",dpi=900,bg="transparent")
```
